text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the JBC Classic, the third race of
Smart Falcon's victory declaration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ever since her declaration, Smart Falcon has kept
calm and focused on achieving victory, but today
she appears strangely unfocused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to say we should have a serious talk after
the race, but she cuts me off with a smile and
heads to the track.
